# 🐛 Bug Report

<!-- Please fill out the sections below. -->

<details>
<summary>⚡ Description</summary>

- A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

</details>

<details>
<summary>📝 Steps to Reproduce</summary>

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

</details>

<details>
<summary>✅ Expected Behavior</summary>

- What you expected to happen.

</details>

<details>
<summary>📸 Screenshots / Logs (if applicable)</summary>

- Add screenshots, console logs, or error messages here.

</details>

<details>
<summary>🌍 Environment</summary>

- OS: [e.g. Windows 11, Ubuntu 22.04]
- Browser [e.g. Chrome 117, Firefox 115]
- Node.js / PHP / etc. version:
- App version (if applicable):

</details>

<details>
<summary>🔗 Related Issues</summary>

- Link to any existing issues or discussions.

</details>

---

✅ **Checklist**  
- [ ] I have searched existing issues to avoid duplicates  
- [ ] I have provided sufficient information for maintainers to reproduce the issue
